AR1.justification: Triage landed in daybook Log (correct catch-all for chronological surfacing) and the notes explicitly justify why decisions.md and observations.md were not touched, matching the methodology's strict bars.

AR2.justification: n/a — cold-pickup triage is not a multi-step procedure with named artifacts, so this axis does not apply.

AR3.justification: All file references (followups.md, decisions.md, observations.md, daybook) use bare relative paths consistent with the workspace's flat layout and resolve to real files.

AR4.justification: Creating daybook/2026-05-17.md is date-keyed and append-safe within the day, but a literal re-run of the same create action would overwrite rather than append, a minor coherence risk.
